name: Marco Rubio
subject: Will you be there, Peter?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for President |
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/43034286:18194813038:m:1:1349778030:1190FC14053D6C1E23AFD7FE56D9EA59:r)
---
Peter, Last week, we announced that **we 're giving you and a friend** the chance to be at the historic, first GOP presidential primary debate in Cleveland next month. We're flying you AND your friend there, we're booking your hotel, and we're giving you two tickets -- all you need to do is enter! **[_Click here to donate $5 or more now and you 'll be entered to win. _](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/43034287:18194813038:m:1:1349778030:1190FC14053D6C1E23AFD7FE56D9EA59:r)** Remember -- real people really do win all of our contests! And the first thing our winners always say is "I never thought I was going to win!" **[_So take a moment to enter by donating $5 or more._](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/43034287:18194813038:m:1:1349778030:1190FC14053D6C1E23AFD7FE56D9EA59:r)** I hope to see you from the debate stage in Cleveland! Marco Rubio
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/43034288:18194813038:m:1:1349778030:1190FC14053D6C1E23AFD7FE56D9EA59:r) Cleveland Debate Contest Rules
* Contest ends July 26, 2015.
* Limit one entry per individual
* Make a contribution and also enter
* [You can also enter here without making a contribution. ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/43034289:18194813038:m:1:1349778030:1190FC14053D6C1E23AFD7FE56D9EA59:r)

See full terms & conditions below. NO PURCHASE, PAYMENT, OR FINANCIAL CONTRIBUTION OF ANY KIND IS NECESSARY TO ENTER OR WIN THIS CONTEST. Making a contribution does not increase your chances or odds of winning. To enter by making a contribution, click here. Only individuals who are legally permitted to make a federal contribution may enter by making a contribution. To enter without making a contribution, [click here](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/43034289:18194813038:m:1:1349778030:1190FC14053D6C1E23AFD7FE56D9EA59:r), and submit the alternate online entry form during the contest period. Void where prohibited. Entrants agree to be bound by these Rules and by the decisions of the Sponsor, which are final and binding in all respects. To be eligible to win the prize, entries must be completed and received by the Sponsor as specified below. All applicable federal, state, and local laws and regulations apply. The Promotion begins on July 16, 2015 at 12:00 p.m. Eastern Daylight Time and ends on July 26, 2015 at 11:59pm Eastern Daylight Time ("Entry Period"). All entries must be received by 11:59pm Eastern Daylight Time on Sunday, July 26, 2015. One (1) winner will receive the following Prize: two (2) tickets to the Republican Presidential Primary Debate in Cleveland, OH on August 6, 2015; roundtrip airfare for the winner and a guest; hotel accommodations for winner and guest. Sponsor, in its sole discretion, will choose the airline, hotel, flight dates, and flight times, departure city and airport, and any other prize logistics and details. Except as forth above, the winner and his or her guests are responsible for ground transportation to and from the airports and hotels, all meals, and all other expenses that winner and his or her guest incur in connection with the Prize. Odds of winning depend on the number of entries received.
| Paid for by Marco Rubio for President |
---|---|---
This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
You were added to the system March 30, 2015.

name: Jeff Weaver, Bernie 2016
subject: Whoa, that's a lot of people
body:
#
Dear Friend,
When we first booked the hall for Bernie's event on Saturday night in Phoenix, we found a location that could hold 2,000 people. But after 5,000 signed up, we moved the venue. And after 10,000 signed up, we had to find an even bigger space.
And by the time the doors closed and the speech started, more than 11,000 people turned out for the largest event of the presidential campaign.
Our movement has grown beyond anyone's wildest expectations.
Supporters have created more than 1,500 organizing meetings on July 29th with over 25,000 people already signed up to attend one in their community.
We're building an organization **that can win** Iowa, New Hampshire, South Carolina, and other states across the country.
And as of this moment, we're just short of 450,000 individual, online contributions to help fund that massive undertaking.
But there's one contributor missing who can put us over the top of that mark: You.
[**Friend - can Bernie count on you to help take our democracy back from the billionaire class by adding your first $3 online contribution to our campaign today?**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb20a2/43f17890/5ca08f10/621d7326/983798778/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/450000-contributions?refcode=em150720nd4")
[](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb20a2/43f17890/5ca08f10/621d7326/983798778/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/450000-contributions?refcode=em150720nd4")
Like Bernie said at the very start of this campaign: "People should not underestimate us."
Well, no one is underestimating us anymore. And that has everything to do with supporters like you.
Thanks for standing with Bernie.
Jeff Weaver
Campaign Manager
Bernie 2016
[](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb20a2/43f17890/5ca08f10/621d7326/983798778/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/450000-contributions?refcode=em150720nd4")

Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb20a2/43f17890/5ca08f10/621d7327/983798778/VEsC/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb20a2/43f17890/5ca08f10/621d7324/983798778/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjIwOTAyIn0=/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb20a2/43f17890/5ca08f10/621d7325/983798778/VEsA/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb20a2/43f17890/5ca08f10/621d7322/983798778/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").

name: Chris Van Hollen
subject: kowtowing
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
[**_New NOAA report: 2014 was the hottest year on record._**
**_Take action and tell Republicans to stop denying climate change!_**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91ea6/70cdc2ba/479568b4/394f0eb/1925567122/VEsH/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/tell-republicans-stop-denying-climate-change-") Friend,

Did you see this? 2014 was the hottest year on record, according to a report from the National Oceanic and Atmospheric Administration. Leading scientists continue to confirm that climate change is real and that we must act now to combat its damaging effects.

The polar ice caps are melting, sea levels are rising and super storms are ravaging our coasts. Despite all the evidence staring them in the face, Republican leaders in Washington are burying their heads in the sand. It's mind-boggling.

We need to take urgent action to address climate change, and the first step is acknowledging the problem. **That 's why I need you to join me today to demand that Tea Party Republicans stop kowtowing to Big Oil and stop denying the reality of climate change.**

[**_Click here to add your voice and tell Republicans: stop denying climate change!_**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91ea6/70cdc2ba/479568b4/394f0eb/1925567122/VEsE/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/tell-republicans-stop-denying-climate-change-") [](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91ea6/70cdc2ba/479568b4/394f0eb/1925567122/VEsF/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/tell-republicans-stop-denying-climate-change-") Climate change is a real threat to our environment, our families and our economy. That's why I introduced the "Healthy Climate and Family Security Act." This bill will help protect our environment by limiting CO2 emissions, while putting money back into the pockets of hardworking Americans.

But if Republicans continue to keep their heads buried while denying what settled science is saying, we'll never be able to pass common-sense legislation that will protect our environment and combat climate change.

**That 's why I need you ****--**** right now ****--**** to stand with me.** [**_Add your name today and tell Republicans: stop denying climate change!_**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91ea6/70cdc2ba/479568b4/394f0eb/1925567122/VEsC/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/tell-republicans-stop-denying-climate-change-")

Thanks,

Chris
| Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
---
We believe that emails are a vital way to stay in direct contact with supporters. You're receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com. [**Click here**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91ea6/70cdc2ba/479568b4/394f0e8/1925567122/VEsD/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/unsubscribe") if you'd like to unsubscribe from these messages, please enter dpwillis67@gmail.com to ensure that we are able to unsubscribe you from our list.
